cleavage agent: digestion with Lys-C (Wako, Japan) at room temperature with 20 ng/μl Lys-C overnight
collision energy: using higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) energy of 32%
fragmentation method: using higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD) energy of 32%
instrument: We used the Orbitrap Fusion Lumos with a TMTc+ method
ionization type: Electrospray ionization was enabled by applying a voltage of 2.6 kV
labeling: we relied on the TMTc+ method
